division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Offenses Against Registration Laws and Suspension, Revocation, and Cancellation of Registration
text: Every person who, while a resident, as defined in Section 516, of this state, with respect to any vehicle owned by him and operated in this state, registers or renews the registration for the vehicle in a foreign jurisdiction, without the payment of appropriate fees and taxes to this state, is guilty of a misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 5. Offenses Against Registration Laws and Suspension, Revocation, and Cancellation of Registration [8800 - 8804]
##### § 8804

Every person who, while a resident, as defined in Section 516, of this state, with respect to any vehicle owned by him and operated in this state, registers or renews the registration for the vehicle in a foreign jurisdiction, without the payment of appropriate fees and taxes to this state, is guilty of a misdemeanor.

*(Added by Stats. 1983, Ch. 409, Sec. 4.)*

subsections.text: Every person who, while a resident, as defined in Section 516, of this state, with respect to any vehicle owned by him and operated in this state, registers or renews the registration for the vehicle in a foreign jurisdiction, without the payment of appropriate fees and taxes to this state, is guilty of a misdemeanor.
